Heads of Terms — Project Thistle: recommended acquisition of GreenHarbor Renewals Ltd by Norhollow Capital plc (listed on City Exchange London).
This document contains inside information under UK MAR; confidential circulation only; maintain clean teams and information barriers between Norhollow’s Digital Products Desk and the M&A team.
Consideration: £152,000,000 comprising £92,000,000 cash and £60,000,000 in new Norhollow Capital plc ordinary shares, subject to completion accounts adjustment.
Cyber condition: Completion conditional on no undisclosed cyber incidents; initial diligence notes a ransomware intrusion at GreenHarbor on 12 May 2026 with no customer data exfiltration; escrow retention up to £8,000,000 if regulatory fines or remediation exceed thresholds.
Crypto/DPT: Target’s pilot digital asset custody service to be ring‑fenced; no new token onboarding and suspension of promotional activity until post‑completion approvals; Norhollow personnel with access to DPT trading to observe an immediate dealing restriction.
ESG/climate: Earn‑out of up to £15,000,000 payable if verified 2027 Scope 1–2 emissions intensity falls by at least 35% and supply‑chain due diligence attains an agreed minimum rating from an independent assurance provider.
Financing: Fully underwritten placing and retail offer of new shares on City Exchange London to raise approximately £70,000,000; settlement T+2; pricing via bookbuild; no distribution of any pathfinder outside approved wall‑crossed investors.
MAR/compliance: Maintain an insider list; initial list to include Mr. Idris Penmore (Head of Strategy), Ms. Liora Vance (General Counsel), and Mr. Tomer Gresh; deal codename “Project Thistle” to be used in all controlled communications.
Blackout and PDMR: PDMRs and connected persons are in blackout from signature until release of a combined circular and for the two weeks prior to H1 results; no exceptions for routine portfolio rebalancing.
Disclosure controls: Selective disclosure and tipping are prohibited; any external approaches must be escalated to the Company Secretary; analysts may be wall‑crossed only via approved scripts and recorded consent.
Commercial protections: 18‑month warranty package with cyber‑security specific indemnities; £10,000,000 W&I insurance to be procured by the sellers; break fee of 1.5% of equity value if sellers solicit a competing proposal during exclusivity.
Conditions precedent: approval by shareholders of Norhollow Capital plc; clearances from the UK Markets and Competition Office and the Digital Infrastructure Supervisory Unit (both fictional for drafting) as well as no material adverse change.
Process/Timing: Exclusivity until 30 September 2026; target signing 14 days post‑completion of confirmatory penetration testing; planned announcement to the market via the City Exchange London announcement service only after both boards approve.
Education/operations only: Our crypto asset handling SOP used in staff training explains wallet cold‑storage and chain‑analysis basics and is not connected to Project Thistle or any live issuer information.
Contact: For queries, please contact Ms. Liora Vance at l.vance@norhollowcapital.co.uk, quoting “Project Thistle TS”.
